objective: Add a mission-bound, paired research-ingress contract over frozen P04 v1, preserve mission lineage through the existing single-writer organism and prove one bounded Recovery Plan v3.1 research mission without domain or canonical writes.
executable_blocker: BLOCKED_INGRESS_CONTRACT_VERSION: frozen P04 v1 can ingest current domain exports but cannot bind them to a research mission or carry that mission into canonical model reservations.
reuse_first: frozen P04 DomainExportBinding and OperationalActionEnvelope validators
byte-identical frozen tools/physical_release_control.py via an additive one-shot adapter
durable model broker reservation and terminal receipt state machine
existing advisor-dispatch timer and connected-worker boundary
forbidden_scope: live trading, live security action, publication, promotion or canonical domain writes
D2/D3, credentials, secrets, raw private evidence or private available_bindings in Git
new broker, daemon, writer, ingress lane or domain payload schema field
manual or direct provider reservation, silent model fallback or KMAX-01 replay
force-push, history rewrite, CI weakening, unrelated refactor or long-soak invention
acceptance_commands: exact PR-head CI green and exact merge-head CI green
one exact mission-bound paired ingress with two domain triggers, shared lineage, replay denial and canonical bounded role reservations
stop_conditions: frozen P04 v1 behavior or accepted receipt must be changed
a second writer, broker, daemon, public listener or direct provider shortcut becomes necessary
a current Market, Bridge or Security identity differs from the pinned pre-mutation identity
D2/D3 or credential material is required
domain deploy, domain restart, live action or canonical scientific write is required
model route would require fallback, substitution or more than five mission calls
rollback: Revert only the additive P04 research-ingress commit and restore the exact previous Bridge release image/unit files; preserve the immutable historical blocked receipt, runtime ledger, owner-only mission evidence and all terminal model receipts.
